activeScenarios.scenario: Submitting a normal business domain creates a trackable asynchronous assessment.
Crawler respects public-only, same-domain, robots.txt, max-page, and max-depth limits.
No report is shown when public evidence is insufficient.
Reports connect scores to found evidence, missing evidence, business impact, and recommended actions.
Customer-facing reports show what was found before what is missing or recommended.
Production and staging deploy only from their designated branches.
PageSpeed failures are reported honestly without inventing performance evidence.
Automated gates pass: format, lint, typecheck, unit tests, integration tests, build, and Cloudflare build.
Reports are decision-oriented and understandable within about one minute.
Validation strategy covers every scoring category.
Known risks and missing inputs are surfaced in MDE status.
Self-QA inspects actual API/UI output before founder review.
Two consecutive clean generations pass before phase readiness is claimed.
